cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.15)
project(qe6502_install_consume_cpp LANGUAGES CXX)

find_package(qe6502 CONFIG REQUIRED)

if(NOT DEFINED QE6502_INSTALL_CONSUME_CASE OR "${QE6502_INSTALL_CONSUME_CASE}" STREQUAL "")
    message(FATAL_ERROR "QE6502_INSTALL_CONSUME_CASE is required")
endif()

if(NOT TARGET qe6502::cpp)
    message(FATAL_ERROR "Expected installed package target qe6502::cpp")
endif()

function(qe6502_add_consumer target_name qe6502_target expect_shared)
    if(NOT TARGET ${qe6502_target})
        message(FATAL_ERROR "Expected installed package target ${qe6502_target}")
    endif()

    add_executable(${target_name} main.cpp)
    target_link_libraries(${target_name} PRIVATE ${qe6502_target})
    target_compile_features(${target_name} PRIVATE cxx_std_17)
    target_compile_definitions(${target_name} PRIVATE QE6502_EXPECT_CPP_SHARED=${expect_shared})

    if(DEFINED QE6502_INSTALL_PREFIX)
        set_target_properties(${target_name} PROPERTIES
            BUILD_RPATH "${QE6502_INSTALL_PREFIX}/lib;${QE6502_INSTALL_PREFIX}/lib64"
        )
    endif()
endfunction()

if(QE6502_INSTALL_CONSUME_CASE STREQUAL "dynamic")
    if(TARGET qe6502::cpp_static)
        message(FATAL_ERROR "Dynamic-only install must not export qe6502::cpp_static")
    endif()
    if(TARGET qe6502::cpp_shared)
        message(FATAL_ERROR "Dynamic-only install should expose the selected C++ target as qe6502::cpp, not qe6502::cpp_shared")
    endif()
    if(NOT TARGET qe6502::shared)
        message(FATAL_ERROR "Dynamic-only install must export qe6502::shared")
    endif()
    if(TARGET qe6502::static)
        message(FATAL_ERROR "Dynamic-only install must not export qe6502::static")
    endif()

    qe6502_add_consumer(qe6502_install_consume_cpp qe6502::cpp 1)
elseif(QE6502_INSTALL_CONSUME_CASE STREQUAL "static")
    if(TARGET qe6502::cpp_static)
        message(FATAL_ERROR "Static-only install should expose the selected C++ target as qe6502::cpp, not qe6502::cpp_static")
    endif()
    if(TARGET qe6502::cpp_shared)
        message(FATAL_ERROR "Static-only install must not export qe6502::cpp_shared")
    endif()
    if(NOT TARGET qe6502::static)
        message(FATAL_ERROR "Static-only install must export qe6502::static")
    endif()
    if(TARGET qe6502::shared)
        message(FATAL_ERROR "Static-only install must not export qe6502::shared")
    endif()

    qe6502_add_consumer(qe6502_install_consume_cpp qe6502::cpp 0)
elseif(QE6502_INSTALL_CONSUME_CASE STREQUAL "both")
    if(NOT TARGET qe6502::static)
        message(FATAL_ERROR "Both-variant install must export qe6502::static")
    endif()
    if(NOT TARGET qe6502::shared)
        message(FATAL_ERROR "Both-variant install must export qe6502::shared")
    endif()
    if(NOT TARGET qe6502::cpp_static)
        message(FATAL_ERROR "Both-variant install must export qe6502::cpp_static")
    endif()
    if(NOT TARGET qe6502::cpp_shared)
        message(FATAL_ERROR "Both-variant install must export qe6502::cpp_shared")
    endif()

    qe6502_add_consumer(qe6502_install_consume_cpp qe6502::cpp 0)
    qe6502_add_consumer(qe6502_install_consume_cpp_shared qe6502::cpp_shared 1)
else()
    message(FATAL_ERROR "Unknown QE6502_INSTALL_CONSUME_CASE: ${QE6502_INSTALL_CONSUME_CASE}")
endif()
